prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite rework
Primary request: preserve this exact approved Order Banner Surgeon sprite, but remove the warm yellowish hue and match the clearer Order material separation of the approved House Marshal redo
Subject: the exact approved Banner Surgeon with the same hooded medic silhouette, same banner shape and markings, same satchel and medical bag layout, same injector or tool read, same armor layout, same cloth shapes, same pose, and same overall identity
Style/medium: preserve the exact painterly pixel-art-inspired tactics sprite finish, moderate pixelation level, readable broad shapes, and runtime-game clarity of the approved sprite; rendered around 101px tall in game, so prioritize strong shape readability and reduced micro-detail
Composition/framing: preserve the exact same full-body crop, stance, orientation, pose, and tight sprite bounds; do not redesign or reinterpret anything
Lighting/mood: same bunker-forged military mood as the approved sprite, but with less muddy amber haze and clearer separation between steel, cloth, and leather
Color palette: preserve the exact Order palette already present in the approved sprite: weathered iron black, aged brass, dark wine red, parchment ivory, and red medical insignia; use the approved House Marshal redo only as a color-balance and material-clarity anchor, not as a structural reference
Materials/textures: lighter bunker armor, worn cloth hood and tabard, leather bags, banner cloth, medical kit details
Constraints: change only color balance, contrast grouping, and material clarity; preserve the exact banner shape and markings, exact medic bag, exact hood silhouette, exact armor layout, exact cloth shapes, exact pose, and exact faction identity from the approved sprite; this must still read as the same approved unit, not a redesign; exactly one subject; no floor; no scenery; no text; no extra subjects; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; avoid oversized transparent padding
Avoid: any banner redesign, any hood redesign, any pose change, any silhouette drift, any new details, any removed details, blue sci-fi tint, cyan lighting, desaturation, glossy rendering, anime rendering, noisy micro-detail, soft blur, cinematic background
